creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Without attempting to diagnose what's wrong, is there some way that I can simply start afresh? 

Without preferences/config/settings.

If it's also necessary to lose data, I don't mind; I'm not a frequent viewer of the web page. 

I'd really like to get over this bug. The noise in logs is a bit of a PITA. 

Thanks
